---
title: "Blog"
---
***
### [Paper Review: Reconstructing the cascade of language processing in the brain using the internal computations of a transformer-based language model](_posts/2022-7-5-ircn_paper_1.html)
*July 6th, 2022*

I had the opportunity to present a paper I read at my lab's weekly meetings. Not sure what to do with the slides afterwards, I decided to write a short post on the paper. 

***
### [Deep Embedded Clustering](_posts/2022-6-13-dec.html)
*June 13th, 2022*

I happened to work on reimplementing a model from a paper, and here were my results along with a brief explanation of how DEC works.

***
### [Transduction](_posts/2022-6-2-transduction.html)
*June 2nd, 2022*

What is transduction in machine learning? Here's a very superficial explanation. 

***
### [First Post](_posts/2022-5-30-first_post.html)
*May 30th, 2022*

First post of the multitudes of blog posts to come (hopefully).
